mnemonics.title: Mutable vs Immutable
mnemonics.content: Mutable objects can be modified, immutable objects cannot

acronyms.expansion: Modified Under The Actual Behavior, Logic, and Environment
acronyms.usage: To remember the characteristics of mutable objects

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a piece of paper that can be written on (mutable) vs a piece of paper that cannot be written on (immutable)

analogies.analogy: A mutable object is like a piece of clay that can be molded and changed, while an immutable object is like a rock that cannot be changed
